name: Homelab Dashboard
subtitle: Monitor and manage your homelab
description: A premium, fully native iOS app for monitoring and managing your personal Homelab ecosystem. Built with Swift 6 and SwiftUI, featuring the Liquid Glass design system.

apps.name: Homelab
apps.subtitle: Your homelab, in your pocket.
apps.localizedDescription:
A premium, fully native iOS app for monitoring and managing your personal Homelab ecosystem.

Integrated services:
• Portainer — Monitor Docker containers, CPU/Memory usage, Start/Stop/Restart
• Pi-hole — Real-time query stats, blocked domains, toggle ad-blocking
• Beszel — System monitor with CPU, Memory, Disk usage across nodes
• Gitea — Browse repos, contribution heatmaps, syntax-highlighted code
• Nginx Proxy Manager — Proxy hosts, redirections, SSL certificates
• Tailscale — VPN connectivity status and quick launch
• AdGuard Home — DNS query stats, filters, blocked services, rewrites
• Healthcheck — Monitor uptime, response times, notifications
• Patchmon — Track software updates and patches across your infrastructure
• Jellystat — Monitor Jellyfin media server usage and playback stats
• Bookmarks — Save and organize your homelab links

Features:
• Multi-instance support for all services
• Cyberpunk visual mode for service cards
• Multilingual: English, Italian, French, Spanish, German
• Liquid Glass UI design
• Face ID / biometric unlock

versions.localizedDescription:
Improved Maltrail event parsing across iOS and Android.
Added compatibility for text-based Maltrail event responses.
Included date and event handling fixes for more reliable Maltrail data.

Fixed Komodo stack detail refresh and fallback handling.
Improved Komodo status presentation on iOS and Android.
Included additional Komodo stability and UX fixes.

Fixed Komodo API payload handling across iOS and Android.
Improved Komodo stack actions and repository compatibility.
Included stability improvements for Komodo integrations.

Added Pterodactyl support across iOS and Android.
Added Calagopus support across iOS and Android.
Improved game server summaries and resource status handling.
Updated the service catalog and README.

- Added Uptime Kuma support across iOS and Android
- Added Ubiquiti Network support across iOS and Android
- Expanded backup support for the new services
- Improved service onboarding, icons, and dashboard coverage

- Added Komodo support across iOS and Android
- Added Maltrail support across iOS and Android
- Added DockMon support across iOS and Android
- Expanded backup and restore support for the new services
- Improved localized UI and service onboarding flows
- Fixed Crafty Controller integration issues\n- Fixed Proxmox dashboard and navigation issues\n- Improved error handling and stability across affected services
- Added Proxmox support across iOS and Android\n- Fixed more than 50 bugs across the app\n- Improved reliability, compatibility, and service integrations

- Fixed Wakapi integration issues across iOS and Android
- Improved Wakapi dashboard compatibility and data handling
- Added more stability improvements and quality fixes
- Next improvements will focus on Proxmox and Ubiquiti UniFi

- Important fixes for iOS
- Important fixes for Dockhand
- Improved service reachability handling
- Stability improvements

## What's New in v1.1.1

- Fixed 2FA authentication for Dockhand
- Stability improvements

### Platforms
- iOS (Swift / SwiftUI)
- Android (Kotlin / Jetpack Compose)

## What's New in v1.1.0

- New service: Wakapi
- New service: Crafty Controller
- Dozens of fixes and improvements

### Platforms
- iOS (Swift / SwiftUI)
- Android (Kotlin / Jetpack Compose)

## What's New in v1.0.6

- Fix for Pangolin
- Fix for Beszel
- Removed cyberpunk mode
- Fixed the Debug Logs card

### Platforms
- iOS (Swift / SwiftUI)
- Android (Kotlin / Jetpack Compose)

## What's New in v1.0.5

Fix Pangolin org-scoped API key support

### Platforms
- 📱 **iOS** (Swift / SwiftUI) — requires iOS 18.0+
- 🤖 **Android** (Kotlin / Jetpack Compose) — requires Android 8.0+

## What's New in v1.0.4

- Fix: iOS system context menu (Copy/Paste/Select) now appears in the correct device language instead of Italian
- Fix: App language now auto-detects device locale on first install
- Fix: HTTP error message now clearly explains LiveContainer limitation
- Improved URL field placeholder to show both http:// and https:// examples

### Platforms
- 📱 **iOS** (Swift / SwiftUI) — requires iOS 18.0+
- 🤖 **Android** (Kotlin / Jetpack Compose) — requires Android 8.0+

## What's New in v1.0.3

- Critical bug fix

### Platforms
- 📱 **iOS** (Swift / SwiftUI) — requires iOS 18.0+
- 🤖 **Android** (Kotlin / Jetpack Compose) — requires Android 8.0+

## What's New in v1.0.2

- Bug fixes and stability improvements
- Update check interval reduced to 15 minutes — new versions now appear much faster in the in-app popup

### Platforms
- 📱 **iOS** (Swift / SwiftUI) — requires iOS 18.0+
- 🤖 **Android** (Kotlin / Jetpack Compose) — requires Android 8.0+

## What's New in v1.0.1

Patch release focused on bug fixes and stability improvements following the v1.0.0 launch.

### Platforms
- 📱 **iOS** (Swift / SwiftUI) — requires iOS 18.0+
- 🤖 **Android** (Kotlin / Jetpack Compose) — requires Android 8.0+

## What's New in v1.0.0

This is a major milestone release — **Homelab 1.0** is here!

### New Services
- **Servarr Stack** — Full dashboard for the complete media automation suite:
  - Sonarr, Radarr, Lidarr, Prowlarr (arr apps with downloads, health, upcoming)
  - qBittorrent (speeds, DHT nodes, Gluetun tunnel/firewall status)
  - Bazarr (subtitle manager — missing subtitles, download status)
  - FlareSolverr (Cloudflare bypass proxy — status and version)
  - Jellyseerr (requests and pending approvals)
- **Technitium DNS** — DNS statistics and query monitoring
- **Pangolin / Newt** — VPN tunnel dashboard
- **Dockhand** — Container manager dashboard
- **Linux Update** — System update status across your hosts

### Design & Customization
- **Home redesign** — Refreshed colors, icons, and card layout
- **Alternate app icons** — 6 variants: Default, Dark, Clear Light, Clear Dark, Tinted Light, Tinted Dark
- **New color theme options** in Settings

### Other Improvements
- Various bug fixes and performance improvements

---

> **A small note:** I'm taking a short break from development to focus on my studies. Thank you for all the support — it means a lot! Development will resume soon. 🙏

---

### Platforms
- 📱 **iOS** (Swift / SwiftUI) — requires iOS 18.0+
- 🤖 **Android** (Kotlin / Jetpack Compose) — requires Android 8.0+

## What's New in v0.9.2

- **Fix**: Update popup now appears on app launch from the dashboard, not only when opening Settings
- **UI**: Update popup is taller and more readable — changelog no longer gets cut off

### Platforms
- 📱 **iOS** (Swift / SwiftUI / Liquid Glass) — requires iOS 18.0+
- 🤖 **Android** (Kotlin / Jetpack Compose / Material 3) — requires Android 8.0+

## What's New in v0.9.1

- **Translations complete**: Italian, French, Spanish, and German now have 100% translation coverage — all strings for backup, biometric auth, Beszel metrics, Gitea, NPM, and Plex are fully localized
- **Bug Fix**: Fixed missing translations for backup/restore and biometric authentication screens on all languages

### Platforms
- 📱 **iOS** (Swift / SwiftUI / Liquid Glass) — requires iOS 18.0+
- 🤖 **Android** (Kotlin / Jetpack Compose / Material 3) — requires Android 8.0+

## What's New in v0.9.0

- **Backup & Restore**: New encrypted backup system — export and import your entire configuration (services, settings, PIN) on both iOS and Android
- **NPMplus Fix**: Fixed authentication flow for NPMplus (Nginx Proxy Manager fork) on both platforms
- **PIN Screen**: Fixed layout and interaction issues on the PIN lock screen
- **Android Battery Fix**: Fixed battery stats not displaying correctly in Beszel

### Platforms
- 📱 **iOS** (Swift / SwiftUI / Liquid Glass) — requires iOS 18.0+
- 🤖 **Android** (Kotlin / Jetpack Compose / Material 3) — requires Android 8.0+

## What's New in v0.8.2

- **NPMplus Support**: Added compatibility with the NPMplus fork of Nginx Proxy Manager (cookie-based token fallback)
- **Configured Services Page**: New dedicated page in Settings to view, add, edit, delete, and reorder all your configured services
- **Update Popup**: Full-screen popup notification on app launch when a new version is available, with changelog display
- **Settings Reorder**: Reorganized settings layout for better usability — donation card on top, cleaner card styles
- **Bug Fixes**: Fixed JPEG-as-PNG resource issue on Android, improved build stability

### Platforms
- 📱 **iOS** (Swift / SwiftUI / Liquid Glass) — requires iOS 18.0+
- 🤖 **Android** (Kotlin / Jetpack Compose / Material 3) — requires Android 8.0+

## What's New

- **Multi-GPU support in Beszel**: Systems with multiple GPUs now display all GPUs as separate cards with individual metrics and history charts (thanks @FlintyLemming!)
- Fix Android build issues (PNG format, missing ProGuard rules)

## Downloads
- **Homelab.ipa** — iOS (sideload via SideStore/AltStore)
- **Homelab.apk** — Android

## What's New in v0.8.0

### New Service: Plex
- Monitor your Plex Media Server from your phone
- View libraries, total items (Movies, Shows, Episodes, Music)
- Active sessions with real-time playback info (resolution, bitrate, user)
- Recently added media overview
- Server info with version and platform details

### Other
- Vibe-coding disclaimer added to README
- Star history chart restored
- Updated to 12 integrated services

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/JohnnWi/homelab-project/compare/v0.7.2...v0.8.0

## What's New in v0.7.2

### New Feature
- **In-app update banner**: the app now checks for new versions and shows a notification in Settings when an update is available

### Bug Fixes
- Fixed cyberpunk mode color inconsistencies
- Fixed button alignment issues across multiple views

### Other
- Added `app-version.json` manifest for remote version checking
- Updated all translations (EN, IT, FR, ES, DE)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/JohnnWi/homelab-project/compare/v0.7.1...v0.7.2

## What's New in v0.7.1

### Bug Fix
- **Nginx Proxy Manager**: Fixed token expiration issue — the authentication token now refreshes automatically in the background, preventing failed requests.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/JohnnWi/homelab-project/compare/v0.7.0...v0.7.1

What's New in v0.7.0:

- New Service: Patchmon — Track software updates and patches
- New Service: Jellystat — Monitor Jellyfin media server usage
- Cyberpunk mode — unique visual theme for service cards
- Android UI redesign for multiple services
- Various bug fixes and stability improvements

## What's New in v0.6.0

### New Service: Healthcheck
- Monitor uptime and health of your services
- View check statuses, response times, and notifications
- Create/edit checks with full configuration

### Improvements
- Redesigned README with table of contents and collapsible screenshot galleries
- Fixed SWIFT_COMPILATION_MODE to persist across project regeneration
- Updated translations (EN, IT, DE, ES, FR)
- Various bug fixes and stability improvements

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/JohnnWi/homelab-project/compare/v0.5.0...v0.6.0

What's New in v0.5.0:

• New Service: AdGuard Home DNS
• Dashboard with real-time query statistics
• Query log, filters, blocked services, rewrites, user rules
• New ServiceIcon component
• Updated translations (EN, IT, DE, ES, FR)
• Various bug fixes and stability improvements

What's New in v0.4.0:

• Redesigned dashboard UI for all services
• New Beszel containers view and system detail
• Line graph visualizations
• Debug logging and improved error handling
• Multi-language support updates
• Various bug fixes and stability improvements

privacy.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Homelab uses Face ID to quickly unlock the app.
privacy.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: Homelab needs to access your local network to communicate with your self-hosted services.
